description:
You are an instructional designer at State University. The Psychology department needs a competency-based learning framework for PSY301 Educational Psychology to align with accreditation requirements. Create a competency framework named 'Educational Psychology Competencies' (shortname: 'edu-psych-comp') containing three competencies: 'Learning Theories and Applications', 'Developmental Psychology', and 'Educational Assessment and Measurement'. Enable competency tracking for the PSY301 course and link 'Learning Theories and Applications' to the 'Learning Theories Essay' activity and 'Educational Assessment and Measurement' to the 'Assessment Design Project' activity.

Login: admin / Admin1234!
